programme.title: Incredible Tales S8
programme.desc: What drives a person to take his own life? Where does he go from there, or is he trapped forever? Trapped in a world without an exit and where he is forced to face his consequences. When stuck in such a situation, what would you do?

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption S3
programme.desc: The team conducts a sting to snare a corrupt judge by using the perfect undercover briber - a completely virtual tech visionary generated by A.I. - only to watch as their Digital Frankenstein quickly spins out of control.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Caught On Camera
programme.desc: A funny and frightening rollercoaster journey investigating our planet's most extreme weather as told and filmed by ordinary people caught in the eye of the storm'. We follow the incredible human stories of the families caught up in snowstorms, avalanches, floods, landslides, terrifying wildfires and too close for comfort lightning strikes. The film uses jaw dropping, often never-before-seen footage, captured on cameras and phones.

programme.title: Count TV
programme.desc: COUNT TV makes math fun for kids! Hosted by Randall and Andy, the two find themselves in all kinds of quizzical, mathematical situations each week. And it's up to them to figure out the solutions!

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus 4
programme.desc: The adventures of Tayo, a blue bus with the number 120. He is very playful and mischievous with his passengers and his friends.

programme.title: Slimed Science
programme.desc: Oh no! Dr Slime's pet fish has died! Probably because the tank was filthy and badly decorated with strange things! What can he do to clean out the tank thoroughly, and what should he use to decorate his fish tank?

programme.title: Slimed Science
programme.desc: Dr Slime has a new friend - EGGWARD. Yes, it's an egg! And he's going on an adventure with Eggward! What can he do to help Eggward float across the waters for his adventures?

programme.title: Wild Kratts S7
programme.desc: In each episode, Chris and Martin Kratt travel to a different corner of the world to meet amazing new animals. Join the Wild Kratts for a laugh-out-loud comedy adventure, as Martin and Chris activate their Creature Power Suits to rescue their animal friends!

programme.title: Pfffirates
programme.desc: On Calypso Island, three crews are taught Pfffiracy by the legendary Captain Lamar. This tough training program ranges from sailing exercises and treasure hunting competitions to cannon firing and accosting enemy ships! But it would take more than that for Pat, Lily or Stede to give up. When a Pfffirate has friends to count on, nothing is impossible!

programme.title: Agents Of Sprawl
programme.desc: Norman runs out of power and collapses. So Zayd and Meiling do their best to lug the unconscious Norman back home to his "mother". But they'll need to escape Zero's mind-zombies, who are eager to steal Norman away. To make things worse, "mother" mistakes Zayd and Meiling for bad guys!

programme.title: Jade Armor S2
programme.desc: Join Lan Jun, the unlikely Chinese teen hero who inherits a magical suit of armor, and her Beasticon talking animal friends, as they continue to defend their city of Ban Tang, against the Crimson Lord and Black Tiger!

programme.title: P. King Duckling
programme.desc: P. King Duckling is an animated comedy series that follows the adventures of a friendly but slightly hapless duck P. King and his two best friends, Wombat and Chumpkins, as they find hilarious and creative ways to overcome challenges.

programme.title: Metal Cardbot S1
programme.desc: (Dual language English and Mandarin) A long time ago, there was a planet named Machina where a race of sentient machines, or Metal Cardbots, resided. One day, the planet suddenly explodes, forcing its inhabitants to live on Earth. To not attract attention, the Cardbots disguise themselves as everyday vehicles. In the present day, Jun, an elementary school kid who loves BMX, accidentally discovers the Metal Breath, a wrist gadget that allows him to capture and power up the Cardbots with differ...

programme.title: P. King Duckling Adventure Buds
programme.desc: This series features three good friends, P. King the silly enthusiastic duckling, Wombat the fluffy book-loving wombat, and Chumpkins the "genius" inventor pig, and their computer assistant Zeusy. For the Adventure Buds, life is all about making every day crazy fun - taking any idea or activity and making it an awesome adventure!

programme.title: Alpha and Omega
programme.desc: Two young wolves at opposite ends of their pack's social order are thrown together into a foreign land and need each other to return home, but love complicates everything.

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: A national fencer swaps her epee for a football in this high-energy challenge. With a young football prodigy as her coach, she must transform her precision, agility, and sharp reflexes into soccer skills. En Garde on the field I say!

programme.title: Films & Stars 2026/27
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: With his trademark adventure-style approach, Steve takes us to South Africa's Ndumo Game Reserve to explore the dangerous world of hippos and crocs. Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

programme.title: Famous Foodies S3
programme.desc: Famous Foodies tells you about what & where the celebrities eat, from healthy lifestyles to haute cuisine.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Having failed to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta, still driven by the need to avenge his father's death, will stop at nothing to take Aquaman down once and for all. This time Black Manta is more formidable than ever before, wielding the power of the mythic Black Trident, which unleashes an ancient and malevolent force. To defeat him, Aquaman will turn to his imprisoned brother Orm, the former King of Atlantis, to forge an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Crimewatch 2026
programme.desc: A baby's uncontrolled cries lead to a violent assault. Watch how officers from the Criminal Investigation Department work together with GRF officers and IOs from various Land Divisions, as well as forensic experts from the Health Sciences Authority, to expose the offender's desperate cover-up and bring him to justice.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Evolution Earth
programme.desc: EVOLUTION EARTH embarks on a global expedition to reveal the extraordinary ways animals are keeping pace with a planet that is changing at superspeed. We meet the scientists, filmmakers and local communities at the front lines of this rapid change. They show that we too can help, and that if we work with nature in planned conservation efforts, nature can do more than survive - it can bounce back. .

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Seventy-year-old widower Ben Whittaker has discovered that retirement isn't all it's cracked up to be. Seizing an opportunity to get back in the game, he becomes a senior intern at an online fashion site, founded and run by Jules Ostin.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.desc: That new house smell. Is it making you sick? Possibly. There's been a surge in formaldehyde removal services. How much should you worry? And what can you do about it? Steven Chia finds out.

Series 4 sees enterprising co-presenter Mark Wright and a new expert de-clutterer join in the challenge of making tired homes relievable – without breaking the bank.

programme.title: Unmai Kann Theduthae
programme.desc: A team of aspiring youngsters with different skill set start an innovative yet unique business model.
